title: Acctim Eden Non-Ticking Sweep Alarm Clock, White Face with Blue Backlight (Black)
features: SMOOTH OPERATION: Features smooth sweep movement for non-ticking operation - perfect for light sleepers and quiet environments
CLEAR DISPLAY: Large, easy-to-read numbers with bold digits on white face, with blue backlight, make time-checking effortless, even in low light conditions
RELIABLE ALARM: Equipped with a dependable alarm function to help maintain your daily schedule with precision and consistency
COMPACT DESIGN: Measures approximately 10 centimetres in diameter with a stable base, ideal for bedside tables or desk placement
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Crafted with durable materials and precise quartz movement, designed in England for reliable timekeeping
description: Experience peaceful mornings with the Acctim Eden Sweep Alarm Clock, featuring an innovative non-ticking movement that ensures smooth operation. The clean, modern design showcases a crisp white dial with bold numerals that are easy to read, even in low light conditions. The sweep seconds hand moves smoothly around the face, eliminating the traditional tick-tock sound. This elegant timepiece, designed in England, combines functionality with style, making it perfect for light sleepers or those who prefer a quiet environment. The clear, high-contrast display features large numbers and precise minute markers for excellent visibility. The alarm function helps you start your day on time, while the compact, stable design prevents accidental tipping. Available in both white and black housing options, this clock seamlessly blends with any bedroom décor. The reliable quartz movement ensures accurate timekeeping, while the straightforward controls make setting the time and alarm effortless.
